# AXIOM Browser — Domain Blocklist
# Version: 1
# Updated: 2026-04-23
# Sources: EasyList, EasyPrivacy, AdGuard DNS (well-known domains only)
# Format: one bare hostname per line; lines starting with # are comments.
#
# To add a per-site allowlist override, do NOT edit this file.
# Instead call AdBlockInterceptor.add_to_allowlist("example.com").

# ── Google advertising ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
doubleclick.net
googleadservices.com
googlesyndication.com
googletagmanager.com
googletagservices.com
google-analytics.com
analytics.google.com
adservice.google.com
pagead2.googlesyndication.com
ads.google.com
adwords.google.com
ad.doubleclick.net
